title: Ubiquiti SuperLink High-Gain Antenna
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-USL-ANT-HG is an omnidirectional antenna designed for use with the SuperLink Gateway . This outdoor-rated antenna with an IP67 certification provides a 7 dBi gain in the 860â930 MHz band, and a 4 dBi gain for the 2400â2480 MHz (Bluetooth) band When using the SuperLink protocol in open space, the antenna enables a range of up to 5 km thanks to its high gain. Bluetooth range in open space reaches up to 100 m SuperLink is a modern wireless protocol designed for reliable, low-latency, long-range communication. It offers significantly better range and power efficiency compared to standard BLE technology while minimizing delays. With advanced update management and high stability, it is ideal for security systems, automation, and industrial applications Antenna (2) Metal mounting straps RF cable SMA Adapter
